desc.en: A port of the mature and well-known DOSBox emulator to libretro with a goal of simplicty and ease of use. This core includes a streamlined workflow for launching games directly from ZIP archives (including disk images therein) with automated mapping of controls to gamepads and a native onscreen keyboard. This is a good core for most users who just want to play games and are not looking for a traditional DOS experience.
desc.zh: [DOSBox-Pure] 是将成熟知名的 DOSBox 模拟器移植到 Libretro 的版本，注重简洁易用。该核心简化了工作流，支持直接从 ZIP 压缩包（包括其中的磁盘镜像）启动游戏，并自动将控制映射到手柄，还内置了原生的屏幕键盘。对于只是想玩游戏而不需要传统 DOS 命令行体验的大多数用户来说，这是一个极佳的选择。
